80485291-8c57-4701-8ce9-58d033f66cef.text: The man glances at you and grunts something unintelligible.

options.text: What do you have in your sack?

d0331cba-3284-4991-b464-fc409b6696b7.title: <player>
d0331cba-3284-4991-b464-fc409b6696b7.text: How rude! I was only being curious.

e6371529-1874-4e59-bbb8-d52a1ff2215f.title: Note
e6371529-1874-4e59-bbb8-d52a1ff2215f.text:
it says has total level of 2376,
but we dont't have sailing, lol
total level without sailing is 2277

options.text: Why do you keep it in a sack?

14e1a845-f162-4143-a87a-95231c06a0e4.title: <player>
14e1a845-f162-4143-a87a-95231c06a0e4.text: Why do you keep it in a sack?

f885c522-18e8-4a4d-904c-7f9798b5216f.title: Mac
f885c522-18e8-4a4d-904c-7f9798b5216f.text: All the things other skillcapes do.

options.text: Can you tell me what they are?
Why do you keep it in a sack?

5047e73f-5fd2-4e27-83dd-f4e1f0401ee8.title: <player>
5047e73f-5fd2-4e27-83dd-f4e1f0401ee8.text: Can you tell me what they are?

e06eb9a1-00ff-48e0-b9b1-03afed454653.title: <player>
e06eb9a1-00ff-48e0-b9b1-03afed454653.text: I'm sure I could make it worth your while.

759f58e8-5e70-4350-8849-ad5caed54293.title: Note
759f58e8-5e70-4350-8849-ad5caed54293.text:
number of coins needed is
total lvl X 1000

69ecc870-cd44-40e2-b9de-a59b1d352e06.title: Note
69ecc870-cd44-40e2-b9de-a59b1d352e06.text:
how ever much the player is carrying,
idk what they say if they have no money.

b57925bd-0792-48d3-bc34-c8fe706489fb.text:
Mac grunts and hands over his cape, pocketing your
money swiftly.

1232b1a8-8e58-4584-a15b-067142bb9c31.title: Note
1232b1a8-8e58-4584-a15b-067142bb9c31.text:
Gives Max Hood and
Max Cape

3250faf8-b9a9-49c1-be4a-30a52096fb1f.title: Wise Old Man
3250faf8-b9a9-49c1-be4a-30a52096fb1f.text:
It's Dionysius here. I'm using my magic to 
communicate to you. Don't worry.

0dc4463b-d534-440a-a994-f427d713c864.title: <player>
0dc4463b-d534-440a-a994-f427d713c864.text: What are you doing in my head?

0b716dee-6054-4248-b7ea-7bb6eeab257b.title: Wise Old Man
0b716dee-6054-4248-b7ea-7bb6eeab257b.text:
I just wanted to say congratulations <player>. I've been 
watching you in your adventures - very well done.

eb69df82-749b-45d1-8bac-2410000b9cb0.title: Hans
eb69df82-749b-45d1-8bac-2410000b9cb0.text:
Oh very well done <player>. Taken you a while, but I 
knew you could do it.

be950d14-36a0-4791-ab4a-c5ec30a1460b.title: Gielinor Guide
be950d14-36a0-4791-ab4a-c5ec30a1460b.text:
Ahhh <player>, I knew you had potential when I first 
met you. My compliments on reaching the pinnacle of 
your achievements.

d7335fcb-ceee-4aa7-93ed-11605adb1f57.title: Note
d7335fcb-ceee-4aa7-93ed-11605adb1f57.text:
Has Completed Dragon Slayer II?
If so, dialogue ends

b1e3737c-2eed-4816-accd-0cd47e2a4edb.title: Bob the Cat
b1e3737c-2eed-4816-accd-0cd47e2a4edb.text: Oh most excellently done old chap!

5aa6a45e-69ff-4059-8c15-a63a747127be.title: Note
5aa6a45e-69ff-4059-8c15-a63a747127be.text: gonna have to guess on word wrap here...

05cf8d13-1b7c-470a-b771-e269dfdb01e3.title: Mac
05cf8d13-1b7c-470a-b771-e269dfdb01e3.text:
Fine... Ajjat gave me unlimited teleports to his 
Warrior's guild and Kamfreena lets me fight her Cyclopes 
without needing those annoying tokens.

86680959-6e33-421e-be69-3231cf68893a.title: Mac
86680959-6e33-421e-be69-3231cf68893a.text:
Melee combat tutor added a ring of life function and the 
armour salesman at the Ranging guild added a magnet and 
undead chicken thing.

fe6e366b-0cb0-46b8-a43f-171f1751cc5c.title: Mac
fe6e366b-0cb0-46b8-a43f-171f1751cc5c.text:
Brother Jered attached a holy wrench and Wizard Sinina 
enchanted the cape so I can change me spellbook.

4eaab65a-f50e-4873-bdbc-46559c8cf495.title: Mac
4eaab65a-f50e-4873-bdbc-46559c8cf495.text:
Aubury attached all of the runecrafting tiaras, an estate
agent sold me some teleports and one of the nurses at the
Emir's Arena made it give me faster hitpoints.

4f39bc1f-ad4e-472a-9e70-67ed3570ac46.title: Mac
4f39bc1f-ad4e-472a-9e70-67ed3570ac46.text:
Agility Arena guy with a Parrot pet made it lighter for 
me and Kaqemeex convinced the Nardah herbalist to make 
potions for me if I wear it and he attached a pestle and 
mortar, toos.

bfdc09e4-ea04-4a65-a4a7-e51f05a7bef5.title: Mac
bfdc09e4-ea04-4a65-a4a7-e51f05a7bef5.text:
Martin Thwait made the cape better for being sneaky and 
the Master Crafter added a teleport to his guild before 
Hickton attached some grapples and a crossbow.

a8b0c12f-bed2-428f-b718-b2f851b2f98b.title: Mac
a8b0c12f-bed2-428f-b718-b2f851b2f98b.text:
Duradel convinced all Slayer masters to give me a chance
at repeating an assignment and the Hunting Expert added 
some useful teleports, too.

e9ca1940-d6f8-4beb-ab81-b523afe85969.title: Mac
e9ca1940-d6f8-4beb-ab81-b523afe85969.text:
A dwarf gave it a chance to give me extra ores and 
another dwarf made it give more experience when making 
gold bars and the Master Chef stopped it from burning 
any food.

abce6674-a548-47e3-8840-fb8a328e8f8c.title: Mac
abce6674-a548-47e3-8840-fb8a328e8f8c.text:
Ignatius Vulcan added a torch for lighting up caves and 
the Woodcutting tutor made it easier to find bird's 
nests and Martin the Master Farmer made it yield
 more herbs.

options.text: Why do you keep it in a sack?
What do you have in your sack?
Can I sell my max cape back to you?
Can I have another hood for my cape?

ce682ee3-9373-4f74-a6f3-370e8bc4631c.title: <player>
ce682ee3-9373-4f74-a6f3-370e8bc4631c.text: Can I sell my max cape back to you?

bf682cd4-d85c-476f-9785-230890ef6076.title: Mac
bf682cd4-d85c-476f-9785-230890ef6076.text: Yip. Show me the goods. I pay 80%.

3cd4a46e-f4d4-4c4e-8304-a73b3a890e09.title: Sell your max cape and hood back?

ecb07529-487d-416c-afe9-b3bcede8d441.title: <player
ecb07529-487d-416c-afe9-b3bcede8d441.text: Can I have another hood for my cape?

6c9de59a-856e-48d5-b7ab-43b273c111ff.title: <player>
6c9de59a-856e-48d5-b7ab-43b273c111ff.text: Yip. No cost. What cape do you want a hood for?

1e3e3bff-0e85-460a-80ac-2050cad76130.text: Mac hands you another hood for your cape.
